'''''Fantome''''' was a [[Tartan-class patrol cruiser|''Tartan''-class patrol cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[Wikipedia:HMS Fantome|HMS ''Fantome'']] was a name given to several British ships.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
